original_text:
### Required Elements Within Sections
- Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).
- Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.
- Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

quotes: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller
Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure clinical claims carry their required qualifying footnotes.
rules.rule_text: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) and accompanying footnote text; the footnote text must be clearly separated and noticeably smaller.

quotes: Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Present patient testimony with clear attribution and a human, supportive visual context.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, use italic or otherwise distinguished styling, and be paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

effect.subject: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Protect locked legal and brand content from unauthorized in-section duplication.
rules.rule_text: The Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI are reserved for locked header/footer components and must never be reproduced in sections.
